metadata.description: Batch 07 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 601-700; lexical fields reviewed

words.definitionEn: a soft natural material from a plant
words.definitionTh: ฝ้าย
words.example: This shirt is made of cotton.

words.definitionEn: used to show past ability or possibility
words.definitionTh: สามารถ / อาจจะ
words.example: Could you help me with this task?

words.definitionEn: a group elected to make decisions
words.definitionTh: สภา / คณะกรรมการ
words.example: The city council approved the plan.

words.definitionEn: to calculate the number of things; a total
words.definitionTh: นับ / จำนวน
words.example: Please count the items carefully.

words.definitionEn: a nation with its own government
words.definitionTh: ประเทศ
words.example: Thailand is a beautiful country.

words.definitionEn: land outside towns and cities
words.definitionTh: ชนบท
words.example: They moved to the countryside.

words.definitionEn: an administrative area of a country
words.definitionTh: เขตการปกครอง / มณฑล
words.example: The county provides local services.

words.definitionEn: two people or things together
words.definitionTh: คู่ / สองสาม
words.example: A couple of questions remain.

words.definitionEn: the ability to face fear or difficulty
words.definitionTh: ความกล้าหาญ
words.example: She showed courage during the emergency.

words.definitionEn: a series of lessons or a direction
words.definitionTh: หลักสูตร / เส้นทาง
words.example: I enrolled in an English course.

words.definitionEn: a place where legal cases are decided
words.definitionTh: ศาล
words.example: The case will be heard in court.

words.definitionEn: a child of your aunt or uncle
words.definitionTh: ลูกพี่ลูกน้อง
words.example: My cousin lives in Chiang Mai.

words.definitionEn: to put something over; something that protects
words.definitionTh: ปกคลุม / สิ่งปกคลุม
words.example: Cover the container with a lid.

words.definitionEn: having something over the surface
words.definitionTh: ที่ถูกปกคลุม
words.example: The floor was covered with dust.

words.definitionEn: a large farm animal kept for milk or meat
words.definitionTh: วัว
words.example: The cow produces milk.

words.definitionEn: a violent collision; to collide
words.definitionTh: การชน / ชน
words.example: Two cars crashed at the junction.

words.definitionEn: very strange or unreasonable
words.definitionTh: บ้าคลั่ง / แปลกมาก
words.example: That sounds like a crazy idea.

words.definitionEn: the thick fatty part of milk; pale yellow
words.definitionTh: ครีม / สีครีม
words.example: She added cream to her coffee.

words.definitionEn: to make something new
words.definitionTh: สร้าง
words.example: The team created a new process.

words.definitionEn: the act of making something or the thing made
words.definitionTh: การสร้าง / สิ่งที่สร้าง
words.example: The project supports job creation.

words.definitionEn: able to produce new and original ideas
words.definitionTh: สร้างสรรค์
words.example: She proposed a creative solution.

words.definitionEn: a living thing, especially an animal
words.definitionTh: สิ่งมีชีวิต
words.example: The forest is home to many creatures.

words.definitionEn: money available to borrow; to recognize a contribution
words.definitionTh: เครดิต / ให้การยอมรับ
words.example: The team deserves credit for the result.

words.definitionEn: a group working together on a ship, aircraft, or project
words.definitionTh: ลูกเรือ / ทีมงาน
words.example: The flight crew checked the cabin.

words.definitionEn: an illegal act
words.definitionTh: อาชญากรรม
words.example: The police investigated the crime.

words.definitionEn: a person who commits a crime; relating to crime
words.definitionTh: อาชญากร / ทางอาญา
words.example: The criminal was arrested.

words.definitionEn: a time of great danger or difficulty
words.definitionTh: วิกฤต
words.example: The company prepared for the crisis.

words.definitionEn: a standard used for judging something
words.definitionTh: เกณฑ์
words.example: Safety is the main selection criterion.

words.definitionEn: a person who gives opinions about quality
words.definitionTh: นักวิจารณ์
words.example: The film critic wrote a review.

words.definitionEn: extremely important or expressing careful judgment
words.definitionTh: สำคัญยิ่ง / เชิงวิจารณ์
words.example: Temperature control is critical to quality.

words.definitionEn: the act of expressing disapproval or judgment
words.definitionTh: การวิจารณ์
words.example: The proposal received constructive criticism.

words.definitionEn: to express disapproval of someone or something
words.definitionTh: วิจารณ์
words.example: It is easy to criticize without evidence.

words.definitionEn: a plant grown in large quantities for food
words.definitionTh: พืชผล
words.example: Rice is an important crop in Thailand.

words.definitionEn: to go from one side to another; a mark with crossing lines
words.definitionTh: ข้าม / กากบาท
words.example: Use the bridge to cross the river.

words.definitionEn: a large group of people in one place
words.definitionTh: ฝูงชน
words.example: A large crowd gathered outside.

words.definitionEn: full of many people
words.definitionTh: แออัด
words.example: The train was crowded this morning.

words.definitionEn: extremely important
words.definitionTh: สำคัญอย่างยิ่ง
words.example: Accurate data is crucial for the decision.

words.definitionEn: causing pain or suffering deliberately
words.definitionTh: โหดร้าย
words.example: The law prevents cruel treatment of animals.

words.definitionEn: to produce tears; a loud call
words.definitionTh: ร้องไห้ / เสียงร้อง
words.example: The baby began to cry.

words.definitionEn: relating to the ideas and customs of a society
words.definitionTh: ทางวัฒนธรรม
words.example: The event celebrates cultural diversity.

words.definitionEn: the customs, arts, and beliefs of a society
words.definitionTh: วัฒนธรรม
words.example: The company promotes a safety culture.

words.definitionEn: a small container used for drinking
words.definitionTh: ถ้วย
words.example: She drank a cup of tea.

words.definitionEn: a cabinet with shelves for storing things
words.definitionTh: ตู้เก็บของ
words.example: The plates are in the cupboard.

words.definitionEn: to make an illness better; a treatment
words.definitionTh: รักษา / วิธีรักษา
words.example: Scientists are searching for a cure.

words.definitionEn: having a curved or spiral shape
words.definitionTh: หยิก / เป็นลอน
words.example: She has curly hair.

words.definitionEn: the system of money used in a country
words.definitionTh: สกุลเงิน
words.example: The baht is the currency of Thailand.

words.definitionEn: happening now; a flow of water or electricity
words.definitionTh: ปัจจุบัน / กระแส
words.example: Check the current temperature.

words.definitionEn: at the present time
words.definitionTh: ในปัจจุบัน
words.example: The machine is currently unavailable.

words.definitionEn: cloth hung to cover a window or stage
words.definitionTh: ผ้าม่าน
words.example: She opened the curtain.

words.definitionEn: a smoothly bending line; to bend
words.definitionTh: เส้นโค้ง / โค้ง
words.example: The road has a sharp curve.

words.definitionEn: having a rounded or bent shape
words.definitionTh: โค้ง
words.example: The pipe has a curved section.

words.definitionEn: a traditional way of behaving
words.definitionTh: ธรรมเนียม
words.example: Removing shoes is a local custom.

words.definitionEn: a person who buys goods or services
words.definitionTh: ลูกค้า
words.example: The customer reported a problem.

words.definitionEn: to divide with a sharp tool; an opening made by cutting
words.definitionTh: ตัด / รอยตัด
words.example: Cut the paper into two pieces.

words.definitionEn: a repeated series; to ride a bicycle
words.definitionTh: วงจร / ปั่นจักรยาน
words.example: The product life cycle has four stages.

words.definitionEn: a father
words.definitionTh: พ่อ
words.example: My dad drives to work.

words.definitionEn: happening every day
words.definitionTh: รายวัน / ทุกวัน
words.example: Complete the daily inspection.

words.definitionEn: physical harm; to harm something
words.definitionTh: ความเสียหาย / ทำให้เสียหาย
words.example: The storm damaged the roof.

words.definitionEn: to move rhythmically to music; such movement
words.definitionTh: เต้นรำ / การเต้นรำ
words.example: They danced at the celebration.

words.definitionEn: a person who dances
words.definitionTh: นักเต้น
words.example: She is a professional dancer.

words.definitionEn: the activity of dancing
words.definitionTh: การเต้นรำ
words.example: Dancing is good exercise.

words.definitionEn: the possibility of harm or injury
words.definitionTh: อันตราย
words.example: The warning sign indicates danger.

words.definitionEn: likely to cause harm
words.definitionTh: อันตราย
words.example: It is dangerous to touch the wire.

words.definitionEn: with little or no light; darkness
words.definitionTh: มืด / ความมืด
words.example: The room became dark.

words.definitionEn: facts or information used for analysis
words.definitionTh: ข้อมูล
words.example: We analysed the production data.

words.definitionEn: a particular day; to write or identify a date
words.definitionTh: วันที่ / ลงวันที่
words.example: Please confirm the delivery date.

words.definitionEn: a female child
words.definitionTh: ลูกสาว
words.example: Their daughter is studying abroad.

words.definitionEn: a period of 24 hours
words.definitionTh: วัน
words.example: The test takes one day.

words.definitionEn: no longer alive
words.definitionTh: ตาย
words.example: The phone battery is dead.

words.definitionEn: to handle something; an agreement
words.definitionTh: จัดการ / ข้อตกลง
words.example: We need to deal with the issue.

words.definitionEn: loved or valued; used to address someone
words.definitionTh: ที่รัก / เรียน
words.example: She wrote a letter to a dear friend.

words.definitionEn: the end of life
words.definitionTh: ความตาย
words.example: The disease can cause death.

words.definitionEn: a formal discussion; to discuss opposing views
words.definitionTh: การอภิปราย / อภิปราย
words.example: The issue caused public debate.

words.definitionEn: money that is owed
words.definitionTh: หนี้
words.example: He worked hard to repay the debt.

words.definitionEn: a period of ten years
words.definitionTh: ทศวรรษ
words.example: Technology changed rapidly over the past decade.

words.definitionEn: the twelfth month of the year
words.definitionTh: ธันวาคม
words.example: The project ends in December.

words.definitionEn: of an acceptable or good standard
words.definitionTh: ดีพอ / เหมาะสม
words.example: The hotel provides decent accommodation.

words.definitionEn: to make a choice after thinking
words.definitionTh: ตัดสินใจ
words.example: We must decide which option to use.

words.definitionEn: a choice made after thinking
words.definitionTh: การตัดสินใจ
words.example: The manager made the final decision.

words.definitionEn: to announce something officially
words.definitionTh: ประกาศ
words.example: The company declared the results.

words.definitionEn: to become less or refuse; a decrease
words.definitionTh: ลดลง / ปฏิเสธ
words.example: She declined the invitation politely.

words.definitionEn: to make something more attractive by adding things
words.definitionTh: ตกแต่ง
words.example: They decorated the room for the party.

words.definitionEn: something used to make a place attractive
words.definitionTh: ของตกแต่ง / การตกแต่ง
words.example: The wall decoration was handmade.

words.definitionEn: to become or make less; a reduction
words.definitionTh: ลดลง / การลดลง
words.example: Defects decreased after the improvement.

words.definitionEn: extending far down or inward
words.definitionTh: ลึก
words.example: The water is two metres deep.

words.definitionEn: to a great depth or degree
words.definitionTh: อย่างลึกซึ้ง
words.example: We are deeply concerned about safety.

words.definitionEn: to win against; a loss in a contest
words.definitionTh: เอาชนะ / ความพ่ายแพ้
words.example: Our team defeated the defending champion.

words.definitionEn: protection against attack
words.definitionTh: การป้องกัน
words.example: The wall provides defence against flooding.

words.definitionEn: to protect from attack or criticism
words.definitionTh: ป้องกัน
words.example: You must defend your conclusion with evidence.

words.definitionEn: to explain the exact meaning of something
words.definitionTh: ให้คำนิยาม
words.example: The procedure clearly defines each step.

words.definitionEn: certain and clear
words.definitionTh: แน่นอน / ชัดเจน
words.example: We need a definite answer today.

words.definitionEn: without doubt
words.definitionTh: อย่างแน่นอน
words.example: This method is definitely safer.

words.definitionEn: a statement of the meaning of a word
words.definitionTh: คำนิยาม
words.example: Check the dictionary definition.

words.definitionEn: a unit of temperature or angle; an academic qualification
words.definitionTh: องศา / ปริญญา
words.example: She has a degree in engineering.

words.definitionEn: to make something late; a period of waiting
words.definitionTh: ทำให้ล่าช้า / ความล่าช้า
words.example: The weather caused a flight delay.

words.definitionEn: done intentionally and carefully
words.definitionTh: โดยเจตนา
words.example: The change was a deliberate decision.

words.definitionEn: intentionally
words.definitionTh: โดยเจตนา
words.example: He deliberately ignored the warning.

words.definitionEn: having a very pleasant taste
words.definitionTh: อร่อย
words.example: The soup was delicious.

words.definitionEn: to give great pleasure; great pleasure
words.definitionTh: ทำให้ยินดี / ความยินดี
words.example: The performance delighted the audience.

words.definitionEn: very pleased
words.definitionTh: ยินดีมาก
words.example: We are delighted with the result.
